title: CISA Shares Lessons Learned from an Incident Response Engagement

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — CISA Shares Lessons Learned from an Incident Response Engage
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/23
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*aaa.zip*'
            - '*agent.tar*'
            - '*agent.zip*'
            - '*c.bat*'
            - '*iox.rar*'
    condition: selection_ip
level: high
